""" pass 抽象基类 在python中，支持多继承，但有一种特殊的类抽象类，不能自己实例化，所以必须借助于继承，继承完后必须重载抽象类方法。 必须重载抽象类方法 1234from collections.abc import Sizeds=Sized()# TypeError: Can't instantiate abstract class Sized with abstract method __len__ 继承抽象基类，重写__len__方法 123456from collections.abc import Sizedclass Test(Sized): def __len__(self): passtest=Test() 这样就正常了！ 类型判断 抽象类一般有以下功能 类型判断 对于类进行方法的限制 比如说，我们想要知道一个类中是否有某方法，首先我们需要知道这个方法具体的名字 123456789class com: def __init__(self,employee_list): self.employee=employee_list def __len__(self): return len(self.employee)c=com(['haha','gaga','lala'])print(hasattr(c,'__len__'))# True 使用抽象基类，可以为我们做类型判断 1234567891011class com: def __init__(self,employee_list): self.employee=employee_list def __len__(self): return len(self.employee)c=com(['haha','gaga','lala'])from collections.abc import Sizedprint(isinstance(c,Sized))# True 对于类进行方法的限制 比如现在我们需要使用缓存，希望能够统一方法的调用，因为我们也不清楚用户使用的是文件缓存，还是redis缓存，所以get方法和set方法不能被写死，必须让用户自己手动实现。 如果用户没有重写set和get方法，我们让它抛异常。 1234567891011class CacheBase: def get(self,key): raise NotImplementedError def set(self,key,value): raise NotImplementedErrorclass RedisCache(CacheBase): passredis_cache=RedisCache()redis_cache.set('name','haha')# NotImplementedError 事实上，我们可以使用抽象基类实现。 123456789101112131415import abcclass CacheBase(metaclass=abc.ABCMeta): @abc.abstractmethod def get(self,key): pass @abc.abstractmethod def set(self,key,value): passclass RedisCache(CacheBase): def get(self,key): pass def set(self,key,value): passredis_cache=RedisCache()redis_cache.set('name','haha') 不再报错，这样，就限制了使用者必须按照规则使用内置的接口。 继承关系的判断 type方法判断的是类与类之间的引用地址是否相等，不判断是否有继承关系，而isinstance可以进行继承关系的判断，所以使用它来进行对象类型判断。 1234567891011121314151617class A: passclass B(A): passb=B()print(isinstance(b,B))print(isinstance(b,A))# True# Trueprint(type(b),A,B,b)print(type(b) is B)print(type(b) is A)# <class '__main__.B'> <class '__main__.A'> <class '__main__.B'> <__main__.B object at 0x00000282E0D4A700># True# False

title: Python 一切皆对象
content: Python中无论变量、函数、类都是对象，使得语法更加灵活，这样的好处在于： 可以赋值给变量 对象可以添加到集合对象中 函数也可以作为参数传递给函数 函数也可以作为函数的返回值 在python中，可以在一个函数中定义另一个函数 123456789101112def A(): def B(): return "reach B" print(B())A()# reach BB()# NameError: name 'B' is not defined 无论何时调用A()，B()会被同时调用；然而B()在A()函数之外是不能够访问的。 函数可以作为返回值 1234567891011121314def A(): def B(): return "reach B" return Ba = A()print(a)# <function A.<locals>.B at 0x00000267081# AE280>print(a())# reach B a指向A函数中的B函数，而a()就说明函数被执行，将会有返回值而不仅仅是函数地址，上述就可以直接写成A()()；如果不带括号，那就可以当作参数被传递。 函数当作参数被传递 12345678910111213def A(): return "reach A"def B(function): print("reach B") print(function())B(A)# reach B# reach A 装饰器 装饰器： 修改其他函数的功能的函数 123456789101112131415161718192021222324def test_decorator(function): def wrapTheFunction(): print("I am doing some boring work before executing function") function() print("I am doing some boring work after executing function") return wrapTheFunctiondef test_requiring_decoration(): print("need a function to remove my foul smell")test_requiring_decoration()# need a function to remove my foul smelltest_requiring_decoration = test_decorator(test_requiring_decoration)test_requiring_decoration()# I am doing some boring work before executing function# need a function to remove my foul smell# I am doing some boring work after executing function The @test_decorator is just a short way of saying: a_function_requiring_decoration = a_new_decorator(a_function_requiring_decoration). 1234567891011121314151617181920def test_decorator(function): def wrapTheFunction(): print("I am doing some boring work before executing function") function() print("I am doing some boring work after executing function") return wrapTheFunction@test_decoratordef test_requiring_decoration(): print("need a function to remove my foul smell")test_requiring_decoration()# I am doing some boring work before executing function # need a function to remove my foul smell# I am doing some boring work after executing function 但是我们浑然不知被修改的函数函数名也被wrapTheFunction替代了 123print(test_requiring_decoration.__name__)# wrapTheFunction 123456789101112131415161718192021222324from functools import wrapsdef test_decorator(function): @wraps(function) def wrapTheFunction(): print("I am doing some boring work before executing function") function() print("I am doing some boring work after executing function") return wrapTheFunction@test_decoratordef test_requiring_decoration(): print("need a function to remove my foul smell")test_requiring_decoration()print(test_requiring_decoration.__name__)# test_requiring_decoration 这样就正常了！

title: Python super函数
content: 注： 本文是对Python 多继承中的补充 在开始前，先来看一个例子 Root中的f函数会被执行吗 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829class Root: def f(self): print("Root.f", self)class A(Root): def f(self): print("A.f", self) super().f()class B(Root): def f(self): print("B.f", self)class C(A, B): def f(self): print("C.f", self) super().f()a = C()a.f()# C.f <__main__.C object at 0x000002135B6F0D00># A.f <__main__.C object at 0x000002135B6F0D00># B.f <__main__.C object at 0x000002135B6F0D00> 从C开始，为什么分别调用了其自身、A、B中的f函数，却没有调用Root中的f函数？ 首先可以确定，Root中的f函数即时被调用，也是最后执行；其次注意在class B中，也没有对父类的调用（super），这导致在调用完B中的f函数后就结束了。 如果B没有Root这个父类，执行流程为C->A->Root。 如果B中添加了super函数，执行流程为C->A->B->Root，但是注意，A的super调用仍然是B，而非父类Root。 所以super是什么？为什么super函数时而调用兄弟，时而调用父类？ super函数返回什么 super函数的返回值是super类的一个实例，称为proxy object，存储当前运行的类以及当前正在运行的对象，当调用super实例方法时，super根据MRO来查找下一个类，并且调用那个类中的方法。 1234567891011121314151617181920class A: def f(self): print(f"called A.f, self is {self}")class B(A): def f(self): print(f"called B.f, self is {self}") b = B() sup = super(B, b) print(type(sup), sup) sup.f()B().f()# called B.f, self is <__main__.B object at 0x000002BB0BB6CC40># <class 'super'> <super: <class 'B'>, <B object>># called A.f, self is <__main__.B object at 0x000002BB0BB6CC40> super函数如何调用 super函数事实上不是调用父类中的函数，而是调用MRO顺序中下一个类的函数。 12345678910111213141516171819class Root: f = "Root"class A(Root): fx = "A"class B(Root): fx = "B"class C(A, B): fx = "C"print([cls.__name__ for cls in C.__mro__])# ['C', 'A', 'B', 'Root', 'object'] 如何确保父类中的方法调用 规则1：做一个基类，所有内容继承自该类，或者也可以都继承自内置的set或dict等类。 规则2：如果某类中某一个方法中使用super函数，那么你应该在所有该方法中使用super函数，可能除了Root之外。 这样最终就能使得父类中的方法被调用，父类可能不是下一级，但无论是什么，也会调用super函数，最终会到达Root，Root则将充当接收器以结束super的调用链。 如何确保传递给super函数的参数有意义 方法1：使用固定的参数位置，使用完全相同的参数 12345678910111213class LoggingDict(dict): def __setitem__(self, key, value): print(f'Setting {key}: {value}') super().__setitem__(key, value) def __getitem__(self, item): print(f'Getting {item}') return super().__getitem__(item) def __delitem__(self, key): print(f'Deleting {key}') return super().__delitem__(key) 似乎是一个好的选择，但也有局限性，对于一个完整的类层级结构，我们不能指望它们在__init__()中采用相同的参数，在这种情况下，使用关键字参数剥离。 方法二：关键字参数剥离，*args和**kwargs让你的函数接受任何位置参数和任何关键字参数，然后剥离你真正想要的关键字参数。 12345678910111213141516171819class Sneaky: def __init__(self, sneaky=False, *args, **kwargs): super().__init__(*args, **kwargs) self.sneaky = sneakyclass Person: def __init__(self, human=False, *args, **kwargs): super().__init__(*args, **kwargs) self.human = humanclass Thief(Sneaky, Person): def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs): super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)t = Thief(human=True, sneaky=True)print(t.human) # True 可以看到在第一个Sneaky类中，sneaky将被剥离，在Person中，human将被剥离，在object中，**kwargs中不会有任何东西。 *args和**kwargs主要用于函数定义，当我们需要定义的函数的传入参数个数不确定时，可以使用*args和**kwargs代替不确定的参数个数。

title: 直到我们再次相遇
content: Until we meet again 反转链表 哨兵节点 12345678910111213class Solution {public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { ListNode *dummy=nullptr,*cur=head; while(cur!=nullptr){ ListNode *tmp=cur->next; cur->next=dummy; dummy=cur; cur=tmp; } return dummy; }}; 充分利用head 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445#include<iostream>using namespace std;struct ListNode { int val; ListNode* next; ListNode() : val(0), next(nullptr) {} ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(nullptr) {} ListNode(int x, ListNode* next) : val(x), next(next) {}};class Solution {public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { if (head == nullptr) return nullptr; ListNode* cur = head; while (head->next != nullptr) { ListNode* tmp = head->next->next; head->next->next = cur; cur = head->next; head->next = tmp; } return cur; }};int main() { ListNode* firstNode = new ListNode(1); ListNode* secondNode = new ListNode(2); ListNode* thirdNode = new ListNode(3); ListNode* forthNode = new ListNode(4); ListNode* fifthNode = new ListNode(5); firstNode->next = secondNode; secondNode->next = thirdNode; thirdNode->next = forthNode; forthNode->next = fifthNode; Solution s; ListNode* head = s.reverseList(firstNode); while (head != nullptr) { cout << head->val << endl; head = head->next; }} 链表的中间结点 1234567891011class Solution {public: ListNode* middleNode(ListNode* head) { ListNode *slow=head,*fast=head; while(fast!=nullptr&&fast->next!=nullptr){ slow=slow->next; fast=fast->next->next; } return slow; }}; 环形链表 123456789101112class Solution {public: bool hasCycle(ListNode *head) { ListNode *slow=head,*fast=head; while(fast!=nullptr&&fast->next!=nullptr){ slow=slow->next; fast=fast->next->next; if(slow==fast) return true; } return false; }}; 环形链表II 快慢指针 让我们返回入口节点，看了众多题解，用双指针做，不知道其他人有木有这个疑问，在上一题能够成环的基础上，为什么就说相遇之后，我让fast指针从head开始出发，每次走一格与slow指针速度保持一致，最终就会在环的入口处相遇呢？还是推导比价靠谱，fast、slow分别表示快慢指针走过的距离，a表示入环前的距离，b+c表示环长，a+b表示slow指针走过的距离。 fast=2∗slowfast=2*slow fast=2∗slow fast=a+b+(b+c)∗nfast=a+b+(b+c)*n fast=a+b+(b+c)∗n slow=a+bslow=a+b slow=a+b a+b=(b+c)∗na+b=(b+c)*n a+b=(b+c)∗n a=(b+c)∗n−ba=(b+c)*n-b a=(b+c)∗n−b a=(b+c)∗(n−1)+ca=(b+c)*(n-1)+c a=(b+c)∗(n−1)+c 乍一看，可能没觉得什么，当我们给n赋值为1，那么a=c，以此类推，我们不难发现slow指针走了数圈一直默默地等待着fast指针，而a=(b+c)∗(n−1)+ca=(b+c)*(n-1)+ca=(b+c)∗(n−1)+c可以说明一切，他们一定会在入口处相遇。 12345678910111213141516171819class Solution {public: ListNode *detectCycle(ListNode *head) { ListNode *slow=head,*fast=head; while(fast!=nullptr&&fast->next!=nullptr){ slow=slow->next; fast=fast->next->next; if(slow==fast){ fast=head; while(fast!=slow){ fast=fast->next; slow=slow->next; } return slow; } } return nullptr; }}; HashSet 1234567891011121314class Solution {public: ListNode *detectCycle(ListNode *head) { unordered_set<ListNode *> visited; while(head!=nullptr){ if(visited.count(head)){ return head; } visited.insert(head); head=head->next; } return nullptr; }}; 再来一题！寻找重复数 C++好像也不存在空数组吧 12345678910111213141516171819class Solution {public: int findDuplicate(vector<int>& nums) { int slow=0; int fast=0; while(true){ slow=nums[slow]; fast=nums[nums[fast]]; if(slow==fast) break; } int ptr=0; while(ptr!=slow){ slow=nums[slow]; ptr=nums[ptr]; } return ptr; }};

title: 短板效应
content: 盛最多水的容器 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#include<iostream>#include<vector>using namespace std;class Solution {public:	int maxArea(vector<int>& height) { int low = 0, high = height.size() - 1, res = 0; while (low < high) { int tmp = 0; if (height[low] < height[high]) { tmp = (high - low) * height[low]; low++; } else { tmp = (high - low) * height[high]; high--; } if (res < tmp) { res = tmp; } } return res;	}};int main() {	Solution s;	vector<int> height = { 1,8,6,2,5,4,8,3,7 };	cout<<s.maxArea(height);} 接雨水 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#include<iostream>#include<vector>using namespace std;class Solution {public:	int trap(vector<int>& height) { int low = 0, high = height.size() - 1; int leftMax = 0, rightMax = 0; int res = 0; while (low < high) { leftMax = max(leftMax, height[low]); rightMax = max(rightMax, height[high]); if (leftMax < rightMax) { res += leftMax - height[low]; low++; } else { res += rightMax - height[high]; high--; } } return res;	}};int main() {	Solution s;	vector<int> height = { 0,1,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,1,2,1 };	cout<<s.trap(height);} 接雨水 II 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566#include<iostream>#include<vector>#include<queue>using namespace std;const int dx[] = { -1,0,1,0 };const int dy[] = { 0,1,0,-1 };class Solution {public:	struct Node { int x, y, h; Node(int xx, int yy, int hh) :x(xx), y(yy), h(hh) {}; bool operator<(const Node& node) const { return h > node.h; }	};	int trapRainWater(vector<vector<int>>& heightMap) { if (heightMap.empty() || heightMap[0].empty()) return 0; priority_queue<Node> minHeap; int rows = heightMap.size(); int cols = heightMap[0].size(); int res = 0; vector<vector<bool>>visited(rows, vector<bool>(cols)); for (int i = 0; i < cols; i++) { visited[0][i] = visited[rows - 1][i] = true; minHeap.push({ 0,i,heightMap[0][i] }); minHeap.push({ rows - 1,i,heightMap[rows - 1][i] }); } for (int j = 1; j < rows - 1; j++) { visited[j][0] = visited[j][cols - 1] = true; minHeap.push({ j,0,heightMap[j][0] }); minHeap.push({ j,cols - 1,heightMap[j][cols - 1] }); } while (!minHeap.empty()) { Node node = minHeap.top(); minHeap.pop(); int x = node.x; int y = node.y; int h = node.h; for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { int nx = x + dx[i]; int ny = y + dy[i]; if (nx >= 0 && nx < rows && ny >= 0 && ny < cols && !visited[nx][ny]) { visited[nx][ny] = true; int height = max(heightMap[nx][ny], node.h); minHeap.push({ nx,ny,height }); if (heightMap[nx][ny] < node.h) { res += node.h - heightMap[nx][ny]; } } } } return res;	}};int main() {	Solution s;	vector<vector<int>> height = { {3,3,3,3,3} ,{3,2,2,2,3},{3,2,1,2,3},{3,2,2,2,3},{3,3,3,3,3} };	cout<<s.trapRainWater(height);}

title: Greedy Algorithm
content: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/6-046j-design-and-analysis-of-algorithms-spring-2015/resources/mit6_046js15_writtenlec12/https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/6-046j-design-and-analysis-of-algorithms-spring-2015/resources/mit6_046js15_writtenlec12/ Recap The greedy technique does not guarantee the best solution, but it does provide a good estimate in most circumstances. For some situations (such as Prim’s and Kruskal’s algorithms), greedy always produces the best answer. If greedy gives the best solution, it is the finest technique among all others. 123456789101112131415Algorithm GREEDY_APPROACH(L, n)// Description : Solve the given problem using a greedy approach// Input : L: List of possible choices, n: the size of the solution // Output : Set Solution containing the solution of the given problemSolution ← ∅for i ← 1 to n do Choice ← Select(L) if (feasible(Choice ∪ Solution)) then Solution ← Choice ∪ Solution endendreturn Solution Problems which can be solved using the greedy method generally possess the following two properties: Greedy choice property: The global optimal solution is found by selecting locally optimal choices, or the ones that appear to be the best at the time. If the choice is feasible, include it in the solution set and reduce the problem by the same amount. The current decision may be influenced by prior decisions, but it is independent by future decisions. Optimal substructure: We say given problem exhibits optimal substructure if the optimal solution to the given problem contains the optimal solution to its subproblems too. In the problem which possesses the optimal substructure, best next choice always leads to an optimal solution. Greedy algorithms are used to find an optimal or near-optimal solution to many real-life problems. A few of them are listed as follow. Dota2 Senate https://leetcode.com/problems/dota2-senate/https://leetcode.com/problems/dota2-senate/ 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849#include <stdio.h>char * predictPartyVictory(char * senate){ int dCount=0, rCount=0, dBan = 0, rBan = 0; int l , head = 0, tail, i; char c; for (i = 0; senate[i] != '\0'; ++i) { if (senate[i] == 'D') { ++dCount; } else { ++rCount; } } tail = i; l = i+1; while (dCount > 0 && rCount > 0) { c = senate[head]; head = (head + 1) % l; if (c == 'D') { if (dBan > 0) { --dBan; --dCount; } else { ++rBan; senate[tail] = 'D'; tail = (tail + 1) % l; } } else { /* c == 'R' */ if (rBan > 0) { --rBan; --rCount; } else { ++dBan; senate[tail] = 'R'; tail = (tail + 1) % l; } } } return dCount > 0 ? "Dire" : "Radiant";}int main() { char senate[] = "DDRRRR"; char* result = predictPartyVictory(senate); printf("%s will announce victory", result); return 0;}// Radiant will announce the victory Minimum Spanning Tree Tree = Connected acyclic graph Spanning tree of graph G = subset of edges of G that form a tree & hit all vertices of G MST: given a weighted graph G=(V,E) find a spanning tree T of minimum weight. Greedy choice property: The greedy choice property refers to choosing the decision that is optimal in the current state at each step, without considering how future decisions will affect the final result. In Prim’s algorithm, the edge with the smallest weight connected to the set U is selected each time and the connected vertices are added to the set U. In Kruskal’s algorithm, the least weighted edge connecting two different connected components is chosen each time until all the vertices are in the same connected component. These greedy choices are based on the minimum weight edge in the current state, without considering the global optimal solution. Optimal substructure: Optimal substructure means that the optimal solution of a problem can be constructed by a series of optimal solutions of subproblems. In Prim’s algorithm, each vertex is added to the minimum spanning tree as a subproblem, and their optimal solutions are combined to form the global optimal solution. In Kruskal’s algorithm, each selection of the edge with the minimum weight is also a subproblem, and each selection is made to construct the optimal solution for the entire minimum spanning tree. kruskal 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869#include <stdio.h>#include <stdbool.h>#define V 5typedef struct { int src, dest, weight;} Edge;int find(int parent[], int i) { while (parent[i] != i) i = parent[i]; return i;}void Union(int parent[], int rank[], int x, int y) { int xRoot = find(parent, x); int yRoot = find(parent, y); if (rank[xRoot] < rank[yRoot]) parent[xRoot] = yRoot; else if (rank[xRoot] > rank[yRoot]) parent[yRoot] = xRoot; else { parent[yRoot] = xRoot; rank[xRoot]++; }}void kruskalMST(Edge edges[]) { int parent[V], rank[V]; for (int i = 0; i < V; i++) { parent[i] = i; rank[i] = 0; } Edge result[V]; int e = 0; int i = 0; while (e < V - 1 && i < V) { Edge next_edge = edges[i++]; int x = find(parent, next_edge.src); int y = find(parent, next_edge.dest); if (x != y) { result[e++] = next_edge; Union(parent, rank, x, y); } } printf("Edge \tWeight "); for (i = 0; i < e; i++) { printf("%d - %d \t%d ", result[i].src, result[i].dest, result[i].weight); }}int main() { Edge edges[] = {{0, 1, 2}, {0, 3, 6}, {1, 2, 3}, {1, 3, 8}, {1, 4, 5}, {2, 4, 7}, {3, 4, 9}}; kruskalMST(edges); return 0;}// Edge Weight// 0 - 1 2 // 0 - 3 6 // 1 - 2 3 // 1 - 4 5 prim 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364#include <stdio.h>#include <stdbool.h>#define INF 9999#define V 5int minDistance(int distance[], bool visited[]) { int min = INF, min_index; for (int v = 0; v < V; v++) { if (!visited[v] && distance[v] < min) { min = distance[v]; min_index = v; } } return min_index;}void primMST(int graph[V][V]) { int parent[V]; int distance[V]; bool visited[V]; for (int i = 0; i < V; i++) { distance[i] = INF; visited[i] = false; } distance[0] = 0; parent[0] = -1; for (int count = 0; count < V - 1; count++) { int u = minDistance(distance, visited); visited[u] = true; for (int v = 0; v < V; v++) { if (graph[u][v] && !visited[v] && graph[u][v] < distance[v]) { parent[v] = u; distance[v] = graph[u][v]; } } } printf("Edge \tWeight "); for (int i = 1; i < V; i++) { printf("%d - %d \t%d ", parent[i], i, graph[i][parent[i]]); }}int main() { int graph[V][V] = {{0, 2, 0, 6, 0}, {2, 0, 3, 8, 5}, {0, 3, 0, 0, 7}, {6, 8, 0, 0, 9}, {0, 5, 7, 9, 0}}; primMST(graph); return 0;}// Edge Weight// 0 - 1 2 // 1 - 2 3 // 0 - 3 6 // 1 - 4 5

title: Linked List
content: Recap What are the differences between head pointer and head node? head pointer: which is a necessary element of the linked list. Pointing to the first node of a linked list, if there is a head node, this pointer points to the head node. So regardless of whether the linked list is empty or not, the header pointer is not empty. Moreover, it has the role of identification. Therefore, the head pointer is often used as the name of the linked list. head node: refers to a node that is established for the purpose of unified and convenient operations. It is placed before the first element node in a linked list, and its data field typically has no meaningful value although it can also be used to store the length of the linked list. With a head node, the operations of inserting a node before the first element node and deleting the first node are unified with the operations performed on other nodes. This is because the head node acts as a placeholder and provides a consistent point of reference for manipulating the linked list, regardless of the specific operation being performed. However, a head node is not necessary. 12345typedef int ElemType;typedef struct Node{ ElemType data; struct Node* Next;}Node,*LinkedList; LinkedList is the pointer pointing to struct Node. LinkedList L; declares a linked list and initializes its pointer L to NULL. Node *p;, declares a pointer p that is used for operations within the linked list, which is used to traverse the linked list and access the elements of each node. Access an element from a linked list. 1234567891011121314151617#define OK 1;#define ERROR 0;typedef int Status; Status GetElem(LinkedList L,int i,ElemType *e){ int j=1; Linkedlist p=L->next; while(j<i&&p){ p=p->next; ++j; } if(j>i||!p){ return ERROR; } *e=p->data; return OK;} Insert an element into a linked list. 12345678910111213141516Status InsertElem(LinkedList *L,int i,ElemType e){ int j=1; LinkedList p=*L,s; while(j<i&&p){ p=p->next; ++j; } if(j>i||!p){ return ERROR; } s=(LinkedList)malloc(sizeof(Node)); s->data=e; s->next=p->next; p->next=s; return OK;} Delete an element from a linked list. 12345678910111213Status DeleteElem(LinkedList *L,int i,ElemType e){ int j=1; LinkedList p=*L; while(j<i&&p){ p=p->next; ++j; } if(j>i||!p){ return ERROR; } p->next=p->next->next; return OK;} Linked List has an advantage over Sequential List in terms of time complexity for deleting and inserting elements. Deletion in Linked List takes constant time complexity of O(1) as it only requires modifying the pointers of nodes. No other elements need to be moved. In contrast, deletion in Sequential List requires moving elements in the array, resulting in a time complexity of O(n) where n is the length of the Sequential List. Elements need to be rearranged after deletion. Insertion in Linked List also takes constant time complexity of O(1) as it only requires modifying the pointers of nodes. No other elements need to be moved. On the other hand, insertion in Sequential List requires shifting all elements after the insertion point, resulting in a time complexity of O(n) where n is the length of the Sequential List. Elements need to be rearranged after insertion. In summary, Linked List offers constant time complexity for deletion and insertion operations O(1), while Sequential List requires moving elements and has a time complexity of O(n). Therefore, Linked List has higher efficiency and advantages in scenarios involving frequent deletion and insertion operations. However, it should be noted that Linked List lacks the ability to access elements quickly and requires traversing the list to find specific positions. Insert the element in front of list head or behind its rear. 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115#include <stdlib.h>typedef int ElemType;typedef int Status;typedef struct LNode{ ElemType data; struct LNode *next;}LNode,*linklist;const int ERROR=0;const int OK=1;Status GetElem(linklist l,int i,ElemType *e){ int j=1; linklist p = l->next; while(j<i&&p){ p=p->next; ++j; } if(j>i||!p){ return ERROR; } *e=p->data; return OK;}Status InsertElem(linklist *l,int i,ElemType e){ int j=1; linklist p = *l,s; while(j<i&&p){ p=p->next; ++j; } if(j>i||!p){ return ERROR; } s=(linklist) malloc(sizeof(LNode)); s->data=e; s->next=p->next; p->next=s; return OK;}Status DeleteElem(linklist *l,int i){ int j=1; linklist p = *l; while(j<i&&p){ p=p->next; ++j; } if(j>i||!p){ return ERROR; } p->next=p->next->next; return OK;}Status CreateListHead(linklist *l,ElemType e){ linklist p=(linklist) malloc(sizeof(LNode)); if(!p){ return ERROR; } p->data=e; p->next=*l; *l=p; return OK;}Status CreateListTail(linklist *l,ElemType e){ linklist p=(linklist) malloc(sizeof(LNode)); if(!p){ return ERROR; } p->data=e; p->next=NULL; if(*l==NULL){ *l=p; }else{ linklist r=*l; while(r->next!=NULL){ r=r->next; } r->next=p; } return OK;}void PrintList(linklist l) { linklist currentNode = l; while (currentNode != NULL) { printf("%d ", currentNode->data); currentNode = currentNode->next; } printf(" ");}int main(int argc,char *argv[]) { linklist myList = NULL; int i; ElemType e; for(i=1;i<argc;i++){ CreateListHead(&myList, atoi(argv[i])); } PrintList(myList); InsertElem(&myList,4,32); PrintList(myList); GetElem(myList,4,&e); printf("%d ",e); DeleteElem(&myList,3); PrintList(myList); return 0;} Delete number at first meet Implement a function to delete the first instance of value from a list, if it exists. If you input a number called 5, then delete this number at first meet, regardless there is any 5 afterwards. 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970#include <stdio.h>#include <stdlib.h>struct node { int value; struct node *next;};struct list { struct node *head;};void listDelete(struct list *l, int value);void printList(struct list *l);int main(void) { struct list *l = malloc(sizeof(struct list)); struct node *node0 = malloc(sizeof(struct node)); struct node *node1 = malloc(sizeof(struct node)); struct node *node2 = malloc(sizeof(struct node)); l->head = node0; node0->value = 0; node0->next = node1; node1->value = 1; node1->next = node2; node2->value = 2; node2->next = NULL; //printList(l); listDelete(l, 1); printList(l); free(l); return 0;}void listDelete(struct list *l, int value) { struct node *current = l->head; if (l->head == NULL) { exit(EXIT_FAILURE); } else if (l->head->value == value) { // the head is target l->head = current->next; free(current); } else { // all other nodes are target while (current->next != NULL) { if (current->next->value == value) { struct node *toDelete = current->next; current->next = toDelete->next; free(toDelete); break; } current = current->next; } }}void printList(struct list *l) { struct node *current = l->head; while (current != NULL) { printf("%d ", current->value); current = current->next; }} Sum of a list Write a function to sum the values in the list. Implement it first using while and then using for. Finally, implement it using recursion. 123456789101112131415161718#include <stdio.h>typedef struct node {	int value;	struct node *next;} Node;typedef Node *List; // pointer to first nodeint sumList(List l) { if (l == NULL) { return 0; } else { return l->value + sumList(l->next); }}

title: Divide & Conquer
content: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/6-046j-design-and-analysis-of-algorithms-spring-2015/resources/mit6_046js15_lec02/https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/6-046j-design-and-analysis-of-algorithms-spring-2015/resources/mit6_046js15_lec02/ Recap A typical Divide and Conquer algorithm solves a problem using following three steps: Divide: This involves dividing the problem into smaller sub-problems. Conquer: Solve sub-problems by calling recursively until solved. Combine: Combine the sub-problems to get the final solution of the whole problem. Median Finding https://leetcode.com/problems/median-of-two-sorted-arrays/https://leetcode.com/problems/median-of-two-sorted-arrays/ 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647#include <stdio.h>double findMedianSortedArrays(int* nums1, int nums1Size, int* nums2, int nums2Size) { int totalSize = nums1Size + nums2Size; int midIndex = totalSize / 2; int i = 0, j = 0, count = 0; double median = 0, prevMedian = 0; while (count <= midIndex) { prevMedian = median; if (i < nums1Size && j < nums2Size) { if (nums1[i] <= nums2[j]) { median = nums1[i++]; } else { median = nums2[j++]; } } else if (i < nums1Size) { median = nums1[i++]; } else if (j < nums2Size) { median = nums2[j++]; } count++; } if (totalSize % 2 == 0) { return (prevMedian + median) / 2.0; } else { return median; }}int main() { int nums1[] = {1, 2}; int nums1Size = sizeof(nums1) / sizeof(nums1[0]); int nums2[] = {3, 4}; int nums2Size = sizeof(nums2) / sizeof(nums2[0]); double median = findMedianSortedArrays(nums1, nums1Size, nums2, nums2Size); printf("Median: %f ", median); return 0;}// Median: 2.500000 Convex Hull https://practice.geeksforgeeks.org/problems/convex-hull2138/1https://practice.geeksforgeeks.org/problems/convex-hull2138/1 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122#include <stdio.h>#include <stdlib.h>#include <stdbool.h>typedef struct { int x; int y;} Point;int orientation(Point p, Point q, Point r) { int val = (q.y - p.y) * (r.x - q.x) - (q.x - p.x) * (r.y - q.y); if (val == 0) return 0; // collinear return (val > 0) ? 1 : 2; // clock or counterclock wise}void convexHullUtil(Point points[], int n, Point hull[], int* count) { if (n < 3) { *count = -1; return; } int leftmost = 0; int i; for (i = 1; i < n; i++) { if (points[i].x < points[leftmost].x) leftmost = i; } int p = leftmost, q; i = 0; do { hull[i++] = points[p]; q = (p + 1) % n; for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (orientation(points[p], points[j], points[q]) == 2) q = j; } p = q; } while (p != leftmost); *count = i;}void merge(Point left[], int leftCount, Point right[], int rightCount, Point sorted[]) { int i = 0, j = 0, k = 0; while (i < leftCount && j < rightCount) { if (left[i].x < right[j].x) sorted[k++] = left[i++]; else if (left[i].x > right[j].x) sorted[k++] = right[j++]; else { if (left[i].y < right[j].y) sorted[k++] = left[i++]; else sorted[k++] = right[j++]; } } while (i < leftCount) sorted[k++] = left[i++]; while (j < rightCount) sorted[k++] = right[j++];}void mergeSort(Point points[], int n) { if (n < 2) return; int mid = n / 2; Point* left = (Point*)malloc(mid * sizeof(Point)); Point* right = (Point*)malloc((n - mid) * sizeof(Point)); for (int i = 0; i < mid; i++) left[i] = points[i]; for (int i = mid; i < n; i++) right[i - mid] = points[i]; mergeSort(left, mid); mergeSort(right, n - mid); merge(left, mid, right, n - mid, points); free(left); free(right);}Point* FindConvexHull(Point* points_list, int n, int* count) { // Sort points based on x-coordinate (and then y-coordinate if x's are equal) mergeSort(points_list, n); Point* convexHull = (Point*)malloc(n * sizeof(Point)); int hullCount = 0; convexHullUtil(points_list, n, convexHull, &hullCount); *count = hullCount; return convexHull;}int main() { Point points[] = {{1,2},{3,1},{5,6}}; int n = sizeof(points) / sizeof(points[0]); Point* convex_hull; int count; convex_hull = FindConvexHull(points, n, &count); if (count < 3) { printf("-1 "); } else { for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) { printf("(%d,%d) ", convex_hull[i].x, convex_hull[i].y); } printf(" "); } free(convex_hull); return 0;}// (1,2) (3,1) (5,6)

title: Graduation
content: 知识点查询 使用 @RestController 和 @RequestMapping 注解来标记，告诉 Spring Boot 框架这是一个 RESTful API，并将请求映射到 /neo4jservice/graph 路径。针对如下方法，GraphController通过@Autowired注入了持久层repository中的 EntityRepository、RelationRepository 类，以在 controller 层中对数据库中的数据进行访问。 这样可以使 Controller 和 Repository 各专其事，实现代码解耦，提高代码的可维护性和可扩展性。 知识图谱查询 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233@RestController@RequestMapping("/neo4jservice/graph")public class GraphController { @Autowired private EntityRepository entityRepository; @Autowired private RelationRepository relationRepository; /** * 从neo4j获取图谱数据 * 将图谱数据发送到vue * @return R */ @PostMapping("/data") public R getGraphData(Integer type,String param){ if (type==null){ //定义一个泛型为Entity的List，表示查询到的所有实体节点的列表。 List<Entity> list1 = (List<Entity>) entityRepository.findAll(); //查询所有实体节点 //定义一个键值对类型为String，值类型为String的集合，表示查询到的所有关系节点的列表。每个元素都是一个Map对象，包含若干个键值对，表示一个关系节点的属性信息。其中，键表示属性名称，值表示属性值。 Collection<Map<String, String>> list2 = relationRepository.getAllRelationShip(); //查询所有关系节点 //将查询到的所有实体节点存储在名为"node"的键下，将查询到的所有关系节点存储在名为"relation"的键下，最终将这些键值对作为响应数据返回给前端。ok()方法表示返回一条成功的响应消息，并将数据封装在响应数据中。 return R.ok().data("node", list1).data("relation", list2); }else if (type==1){ List<Entity> entities = entityRepository.queryRelativeEntity(param); //根据参数查询相关的实体节点 Collection<Map<String, String>> list = relationRepository.getRelativeEntityByNode(param); //根据参数查询相关的关系节点 return R.ok().data("relation",list).data("node", entities); }else { return R.ok().message("功能未开发"); } }} 图谱路径查询 通过继承 Neo4jRepository<RelationShip, Long> 接口来实现 Neo4j 数据库的操作，RelationRepository 接口中包含了对实体 RelationShip 进行 CURD （增、删、改、查）操作的方法，具体包括：继承 CrudRepository 接口的基本 CRUD 操作方法，例如 save()、delete()、findById() 方法等等；使用 @Query 注解自定义查询的方法。 RelationShip 表示关系类，用于封装关系实体的属性和方法。@Repository 注解表示这个接口是一个 Spring 管理的组件，用于对数据库进行操作。当 RelationRepository 的方法被调用时，Spring Data Neo4j 会自动根据方法名和参数类型推算出对应的 Cypher 查询语句，并将查询结果映射成我们所需要的实体类或者其他类型的对象。 getShortestPath 定义一个带有 @Query 注解的自定义查询方法getShortestPath，用于查询知识图谱中起点名为 start，终点名为 end 的实体之间的最短路径，并返回最短路径上所有实体节点（不包括关系节点）。 在 Cypher 查询语句中，使用 MATCH 语句匹配起点和终点，使用 shortestpath((p1)-[r*..4]->(p2)) 匹配最短路径。其中，shortestpath() 用于匹配最短路径，p1 和 p2 分别表示起点和终点，r 表示匹配起点和终点之间的关系，r*..4 表示匹配从 1 到 4 次关系（即最短路径），任意方向都可行。 最后，return nodes(p) 返回最短路径的所有节点，使用Cypher中的函数 nodes(p) 返回指定路径 p 中的所有实体节点。返回 List<Entity> 类型的结果，其中 Entity 表示实体类，用于封装查询返回的实体节点信息。由于 Entity 类型不仅包含知识图谱中的实体节点，也包含关系节点和属性，因此需要在查询语句中使用 nodes(p) 进行过滤。 12345@Repositorypublic interface RelationRepository extends Neo4jRepository<RelationShip, Long> { @Query("MATCH (p1:knowledge{name:{start}}),(p2:knowledge{name:{end}})," + "p=shortestpath((p1)-[r*..4]->(p2)) return nodes(p)") List<Entity> getShortestPath(@Param("start") String start, @Param("end") String end);} getRelationShipByNode 写一个带有 @Query 注解的 Neo4j 查询语句，用于查询节点之间的关系。具体来说，该查询会匹配节点 n 到节点 m 之间的关系 r，并通过 where 子句过滤出起点名称为 from、终点名称为 to 的关系。最后，查询结果通过 return 子句返回关系的起点 ID、终点 ID、起点名称、终点名称、关系类型和关系注释等属性。 在该查询语句中，我们可以看到以下的语法和关键字： MATCH (n)-[r]->(m): 使用 MATCH 关键字匹配节点 n 到节点 m 之间的关系 r。 WHERE n.name={from} AND m.name={to}: 使用 WHERE 子句过滤起点名称为 from、终点名称为 to 的关系。 RETURN n.identity as start,m.identity as end, n.name as from, m.name as to, r.relation as relation, r.note as note: 使用 RETURN 子句返回查询结果，其中关系的起点 ID 被命名为 start，终点 ID 被命名为 end，起点名称被命名为 from，终点名称被命名为 to，关系类型被命名为 relation，关系注释被命名为 note。 此外，该查询语句还使用了 @Param 注解，用于将方法参数映射到 Cypher 中的占位符。在该查询语句中，{from} 和 {to} 占位符分别对应方法中的参数 from 和 to，用于接收匹配关系的起点和终点。 12345@Repositorypublic interface RelationRepository extends Neo4jRepository<RelationShip, Long> { @Query("match (n)-[r]->(m) where n.name={from} and m.name={to} return n.identity as start,m.identity as end," + "n.name as from,m.name as to,r.relation as relation,r.note as note") List<Map<String,String>> getRelationShipByNode(@Param("from") String form, @Param("to") String to);} 这是一个获取起点和终点之间最短路径的 API，包含一个基于 @GetMapping 注解的 getShortestPath 方法，该方法接收起点名称和终点名称作为参数，并返回一个包含实体和关系信息的 JSON 响应。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839@RestController@RequestMapping("/neo4jservice/graph")public class GraphController { @Autowired private EntityRepository entityRepository; @Autowired private RelationRepository relationRepository; /** * 最短路径查询 * @return R */ @GetMapping("/shortPath") public R getShortestPath(String start, String end){ List<Entity> entities = relationRepository.getShortestPath(start,end); //获取起点和终点之间的最短路径，得到一个实体对象的列表 Entity from = new Entity(); System.out.println(from); Entity to = new Entity(); System.out.println(to); List<Map<String, String>> relations = new ArrayList<>(); //遍历这个实体对象列表 for(int i=1;i<entities.size();i++){ from = entities.get(i-1); to = entities.get(i); //通过 getRelationShipByNode() 方法查询每一个相邻实体对象之间的关系，并将查询到的关系信息（从起点from到终点to）封装到 Map 中，加入 relations 列表中。 List<Map<String, String>> rels = relationRepository.getRelationShipByNode(from.getName(), to.getName()); if (rels != null && rels.size() > 0) { relations.add(rels.get(0)); } else { // 抛出异常或者返回错误信息，处理查询不到关联信息的情况 return R.error().message("关系查询不到"); } } //使用 ok() 方法表示请求成功，然后使用 data() 方法将实体列表(entities)和关系列表(relations)分别存储在响应对象的 data 属性中，以便客户端获取这些数据。 return R.ok().data("node", entities).data("relation",relations); }} 考试管理 使用 @RestController 和 @RequestMapping 注解来标记，这将告诉 Spring Boot 框架这是一个 RESTful API，并将请求映射到 /eduservice/examination/ 路径。控制器还依赖注入了一个 ExamService 服务类，该服务类主要用于查询和处理作业信息的业务逻辑。 我的考试 查看试卷列表 包含一个基于 @RequestMapping 注解的 queryTitlePage 方法，该方法接收一个 TaskQuery 对象作为参数，并返回一个包含作业信息的 JSON 响应。 在 queryTitlePage 方法中，首先调用 examService.queryTaskList(query) 方法查询作业列表，并将结果封装到一个 listPageResult 列表中。接着，将这个列表作为参数传递给一个 R.ok() 方法，生成一个响应对象，这个响应对象的 data 属性包含了查询到的作业信息列表。最后，将这个响应对象返回给前端页面。 123456789101112131415161718@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/examination/")public class ExamController{ @Autowired private ExamService examService; /** * 查询作业info list * @param query * @return R */ @RequestMapping("queryTaskPage") public R queryTitlePage(TaskQuery query) { List<TaskInfo> listPageResult = examService.queryTaskList(query); return R.ok().data("data", listPageResult); }} 访问单套试卷 包含一个基于 @PostMapping 注解的 addPaperByStudent 方法，该方法接收一个 JSON 对象作为参数，并返回包含试卷信息的 JSON 响应。 在 addPaperByStudent 方法中，首先获取教师和学生的身份信息，并根据这些信息获取指定的作业和学生信息。接着，通过调用 taskTestService.getPaperFromTaskBook(Integer.parseInt(taskId), userId) 方法获取指定作业和学生创建的试卷信息，并将试卷列表封装到 taskTestList 列表中。 如果查询到的试卷列表为空，则创建一个新的试卷，并将其添加到 taskTestList 列表中，最后将 taskTestList 列表返回给前端页面。 注意： user 和 map 是从前端页面中传递过来的 JSON 对象，用于获取用户信息和指定的学生 ID。 user.getIdentity() 方法是用于获取用户身份信息的，这个方法的具体实现需要查看 user 对象类型及其属性。 由于之前没有查询到试卷，因此需要重新从数据库中获取试卷信息，并将新的试卷信息更新到 taskTestList 对象中，以便后面的操作使用。这段代码确保了无论如何都能返回有效的试卷数据，避免了程序出错或者没有数据返回的情况。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/examination/")public class ExamController{ @Autowired private TaskUserService taskUserService; @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 1.获取学生试卷 * 返回 taskTestLevel * 2.如果没有获取到试卷 * 那么根据作业本重建一个 taskTest * 并返回 taskTestLevel * @return R */ @PostMapping("getTaskTitleById") public R addPaperByStudent(@RequestBody Map<String, String> map){ String teacher = "teacher"; String taskId = map.get("taskId"); String userId = ""; EduUser user = userUtil.getUser(); //判断当前用户身份是否为教师 if (teacher.equals(user.getIdentity())){ userId = map.get("userId");//如果是教师身份，获取到指定的学生 ID，并将其赋值给 userId 变量 }else { userId = user.getId().toString();//如果是学生，则将学生 ID 转换为字符串，再将其赋值给 userId 变量 } //从数据库中获取指定作业和学生的试卷信息，并将查询结果封装到 List<TaskTestVO> 对象中。其中，taskId 和 userId 是这个方法的两个参数，用于指定需要查询的作业和学生信息 List<TaskTestVO> taskTestList = taskTestService.getPaperFromTaskBook(Integer.parseInt(taskId), userId); //没有查询到新建的paper_test //如果在数据库中没有找到任何试卷，那么需要创建一个新的试卷，并将创建的试卷信息添加到试卷列表 taskTestList 中 if(taskTestList.size() == 0){//通过判断获取到的试卷列表 taskTestList 的长度来确定是否查询到了试卷数据 //如果没有该试卷，创建一个 TaskUser 对象，并将 userId、taskId、fraction、status 等属性设置为相应的值；然后将这个 TaskUser 对象保存到数据库中（也就是将这个试卷信息写入数据库中） TaskUser taskUser = new TaskUser(); taskUser.setUserId(userId); taskUser.setTaskId(Integer.parseInt(taskId)); taskUser.setFraction(0); taskUser.setStatus(0); taskUserService.save(taskUser); //使用 taskTestService.generateTaskTest 方法生成这个试卷的试题，并重新从数据库中查询获取试卷列表，最终将获取到的试卷列表 taskTestList 返回给前端页面 taskTestService.generateTaskTest(Integer.parseInt(taskId), user.getId()); //重新从数据库中获取指定作业和学生的试卷信息，以确保程序能够正确执行，并返回有效的数据给前端页面 taskTestList = taskTestService.getPaperFromTaskBook(Integer.parseInt(taskId), user.getId().toString()); } //分割答案 for (TaskTestVO taskVo:taskTestList) { taskVo.splitChoices(); taskVo.reWriteAnswer(); } return R.ok().data("data", taskTestList); }} 提交做题记录 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/examination/")public class ExamController{ @Autowired private TaskUserService taskUserService; @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 1.保存学生答案 * 2.保存生成task_user成绩单 * @return r */ @PostMapping("savePaper") public R saveTaskPaper(@RequestBody List<TaskTest> list){ //使用了Java 8的foreach语法，遍历list集合中的所有TaskTest对象，并依次调用TaskTest的filterCorrectAnswer()方法。 list.forEach(TaskTest::filterCorrectAnswer); //将list中的所有TaskTest对象批量更新到数据库中 taskTestService.updateBatchById(list); //声明了一个TaskUser对象，并创建了它的一个实例 TaskUser taskUser = new TaskUser(); //调用了userUtil.getUser()方法，获取了当前用户信息（EduUser对象） EduUser user = userUtil.getUser(); taskUser.setUserId(user.getId().toString()); taskUser.setTaskId(list.get(0).getTaskId()); taskUser.setStatus(1); //声明了一个QueryWrapper对象，并创建了它的一个实例 QueryWrapper<TaskUser> wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>(); //查询条件设置为"task_id = list.get(0).getTaskId()“，代表list集合中的第一个TaskTest对象的taskId属性 wrapper.eq("task_id", list.get(0).getTaskId()); //另一个查询条件设置为"user_id = user.getId().toString()”，代表当前用户id wrapper.eq("user_id", user.getId().toString()); // 调用taskUserService对象的update方法来更新TaskUser对象 if(!taskUserService.update(taskUser,wrapper)){ // 如果更新成功，则调用taskUserService对象的save方法来保存TaskUser对象 taskUserService.save(taskUser); } return R.ok(); }} 我的错题 客户端发起HTTP请求时，Controller层将请求转发给对应的Service层的方法进行处理，然后Service层调用Mapper层的方法来访问数据库并处理数据，最终返回处理后的结果给Controller层，Controller层将接收到的结果封装为HTTP响应返回给客户端。 个人错题展示 错题获取为获取途径分为两部分，分别来自getWrongTaskTestTitle和getWrongTaskTestTitle1方法，传入参数user_id，汇总为List<Map<String, String>>类型的mergedList。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/paper/")public class PaperController { @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 获取所有的错题 * 获取用户所有的错题 * @return r */ @GetMapping("wrongTitle") public R getWrongTitle() { EduUser user = userUtil.getUser(); List<Map<String, String>> list = taskTestService.getWrongTaskTestTitle(user.getId().toString()); List<Map<String, String>> list1 = taskTestService.getWrongTaskTestTitle1(user.getId().toString()); List<Map<String, String>> mergedList = new ArrayList<>(); mergedList.addAll(list); mergedList.addAll(list1); return R.ok().data("data", mergedList); }} 通过TaskTestServiceImpl类实现TaskTestService接口，并使用@Service注解表示这个类将作为Spring容器中的一个Bean。它包括了TaskTestMapper和QuestionMapper两个属性，并使用@Autowired注解来标记它们将由Spring框架自动装配创建。 1234567public interface TaskTestService extends IService<TaskTest> { List<Map<String, String>> getWrongTaskTestTitle(String userId); List<Map<String, String>> getWrongTaskTestTitle1(String userId);} TaskTestServiceImpl类重写TaskTestService接口中定义的getWrongTaskTestTitle和getWrongTaskTestTitle1方法来获取用户做错的题目信息。它调用了getWrongTaskTestTitle和getWrongTaskTestTitle1方法，并返回查询结果。 123456789101112131415161718@Servicepublic class TaskTestServiceImpl extends ServiceImpl<TaskTestMapper,TaskTest> implements TaskTestService { @Autowired private TaskTestMapper taskTestMapper; @Override public List<Map<String, String>> getWrongTaskTestTitle(String userId) { String score = "0"; return taskTestMapper.getWrongTaskTestTitle(userId); } @Override public List<Map<String, String>> getWrongTaskTestTitle1(String userId) { String score = "0"; return taskTestMapper.getWrongTaskTestTitle1(userId); }} 定义一个TaskTestMapper接口，继承BaseMapper<TaskTest>接口。BaseMapper是mybatis-plus的一个接口，提供了基本的数据库操作方法。TaskTestMapper包括getWrongTaskTestTitle和getWrongTaskTestTitle1方法，用于查询用户做错的题目信息。使用了注解@Param("userId")表示userId参数的名字。 12345678910111213141516@Mapperpublic interface TaskTestMapper extends BaseMapper<TaskTest> { /** * 查询所有的错题 * @param userId * @return */ List<Map<String,String>> getWrongTaskTestTitle(@Param("userId") String userId); /** * 查询所有的错题 * @param userId * @return */ List<Map<String,String>> getWrongTaskTestTitle1(@Param("userId") String userId);} 在xml配置文件中，为TaskTestMapper定义了getWrongTaskTestTitle和getWrongTaskTestTitle1查询方法的实现。以下分别从数据库中获取有task_id的任务（随堂测试）和无task_id的任务（自己刷题）的错题。 12345678910111213141516<mapper namespace="com.atguigu.eduservice.mapper.TaskTestMapper"> <select id="getWrongTaskTestTitle" resultType="java.util.HashMap"> select task_test.id,question title,q.id title_id,q.answer correctAnswer,task_test.answer sAnswer, task_name,teach_name,analysis,knowl,task_test.create_time createTime from task_test inner join task_info on task_info.task_id=task_test.task_id inner join question q on task_test.title_id=q.id where user_id=#{userId} and task_test.question_answer!=task_test.answer </select> <select id="getWrongTaskTestTitle1" resultType="java.util.HashMap"> select task_test.id,question title,q.id title_id,q.answer correctAnswer,task_test.answer sAnswer, analysis,knowl,task_test.create_time createTime from task_test inner join question q on task_test.title_id=q.id where user_id=#{userId} and task_test.question_answer!=task_test.answer </select></mapper> 根据titleId获取某一道错题 12345678910111213141516171819202122@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/paper/")public class PaperController { @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 错题模块 * 根据titleId获取 * 题库题目 */ @GetMapping("getTitleById") public R getTitleByTitleId(String titleId){ if (titleId!=null){ Question question = taskTestService.getQuestionById(Integer.parseInt(titleId)); question.splitChoices(); return R.ok().data("data",question); } return R.error().message("数据参数报错"); }} 1234567891011@Servicepublic class TaskTestServiceImpl extends ServiceImpl<TaskTestMapper,TaskTest> implements TaskTestService { @Autowired private TaskTestMapper taskTestMapper; @Override public Question getQuestionById(Integer titleId) { return taskTestMapper.getQuestionById(titleId); }} 12345<mapper namespace="com.atguigu.eduservice.mapper.TaskTestMapper"> <select id="getQuestionById" resultType="com.atguigu.eduservice.entity.Question"> select * from question where question.id=#{titleId} </select></mapper> 习题推荐 基于错题知识点推荐 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/paper/")public class PaperController { @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 根据错题的知识点 * 推荐一定数量的题目 * 根据知识点的词频进行题目的筛选 * 根据知识点随机抽取 * @return 1 */ @GetMapping("recommendTitle") public R getRecommendTitle() { EduUser user = userUtil.getUser(); List<Map<String, String>> list = taskTestService.getWrongTaskTestTitle(user.getId().toString()); List<Map<String, String>> list1 = taskTestService.getWrongTaskTestTitle1(user.getId().toString()); List<Map<String, String>> mergeList = new ArrayList<>(); mergeList.addAll(list); mergeList.addAll(list1); String s = mergeList.stream().map(p->p.get("knowl")).collect(Collectors.joining(",")); //针对Stream对象中的每个元素p，取出其中键名为"knowl"的值，并以此构造出一个新的Stream对象。 String[] arr1 = s.split(",");//将字符串 s 按逗号 “,” 分割为一个字符串数组 arr1 Random random = new Random(); List<Question> list2 = new ArrayList<>();//创建一个 List<Question> 类型的列表 list2 int titleSize = 20; //循环往复直到列表 list2 中的题目数达到预设的 titleSize while (list2.size()< titleSize){ //通过随机数获取 arr1 中的一个知识点 knowledge String knowledge = arr1[random.nextInt(arr1.length)]; //从数据库中查询该知识点相关的一些题目，将这些题目加入列表 list2 中 list2.addAll(taskTestService.getSomeTitleByKnowledge(knowledge)); } list2.forEach(Question::splitChoices);//在得到一组题目后，对题目选项进行处理 return R.ok().data("data", list2);//将题目集合list2返回给前端 }} 基于协同过滤推荐 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/paper/")public class PaperController { @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 协同过滤算法 * fraction-based * 1.相同level的分数 * 2.皮尔逊相关系数计算作业分数矩阵 * 计算出与本用户分数相似的用户 * 然后从其他用户题目的知识点里 * knowledge-based * 1.推荐本用户没有做过的知识点题目 * 以加强本用户知识点掌握熟练程度 * @return r */ @GetMapping("collaborate") public R filterCollaborativeTitle(){ EduUser user = userUtil.getUser(); PearsonCorrelationScore pearsonCorrelation = new PearsonCorrelationScore(); QueryWrapper<TaskUser> wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();//使用Mybatis-Plus提供的QueryWrapper来进行查询，新建一个空的QueryWrapper类对象 List<TaskUser> taskUserList = taskUserService.list(wrapper);//运用Mybatis-Plus内置的list方法，将TaskUser表的数据查询到List中 //将TaskUser对象的userId提取出来并组成一个列表（即userIdList），利用Stream的map方法，对每个TaskUser对象执行getUserId方法；提取出任务用户ID，并将多个任务用户ID组成一个新的Stream；使用Stream的collect方法转换成List类型的userIdList List<String> userIdList = taskUserList.stream().map(TaskUser::getUserId).collect(Collectors.toList()); //去重后生成新的列表，对userIdList进行Stream的处理，使用distinct方法去重，然后再将去重后得到的数据转换成List类型的userIds并返回 List<String> userIds = userIdList.stream().distinct().collect(Collectors.toList()); //遍历用户列表 for (String userId: userIds){ //对于每个用户遍历匹配到的知识点的记录，将其分数以键值对的形式存储到map1中 Map<Integer, Integer> map1 = taskUserList.stream(). filter(p -> p.getUserId().equals(userId)). collect(Collectors.toMap(TaskUser::getTaskId,TaskUser::getFraction)); //使用pearsonCorrelation实例对象保存每个用户的得分map pearsonCorrelation.addDataMap(userId, map1); } //获取与当前用户最为相似的用户 String similarPerson = pearsonCorrelation.getBestMatchUser(user.getId().toString()); // query匹配的用户做过的knowledge，如果存在一个与该用户相似的用户 if (!"".equals(similarPerson)){ //获取该相似用户所做过的所有知识点 List<String> knowList = taskTestService.getMatchedKnowledgeByOtherPeople(user.getId().toString(),similarPerson); if (knowList.size()==0){ return R.error().message("用户信息不足"); } //创建一个ArrayList用于存储随机出来的试题 List<Question> questions = new ArrayList<>(); //定义考试的题目数 int titleSize = 20; // 但是该用户所没有的knowledge，实例化Random类用于随机选题 Random random = new Random(); //当设置的试题数量达不到目标20题时继续循环 while (questions.size()< titleSize){ //从相似知识点列表中随机选出一个知识点 String knowledge = knowList.get(random.nextInt(knowList.size())); //选择该知识点对应的题目 questions.addAll(taskTestService.getSomeTitleByKnowledge(knowledge)); } return R.ok().data("data",questions); } return R.error().message("用户信息不足"); }} 提交推荐的题目已做完部分 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536@RestController@RequestMapping("/eduservice/paper/")public class PaperController { @Autowired private TaskTestService taskTestService; /** * 提交推荐的题目所做的答案 * 只提交已经完成的部分 * @return 1 */ @PostMapping("submitRecommendTitle") public R submitRecommendTitle(@RequestBody List<Question> list){ EduUser user = userUtil.getUser(); List<Question> list2 = list.stream().filter(a -> a.getStuAnswer() != null).collect(Collectors.toList()); List<TaskTest> taskTestList = new ArrayList<>(); for (Question q: list2) { q.filterCorrectAnswer(); TaskTest taskTest = new TaskTest(); taskTest.setTitleId(q.getId()); taskTest.setQuestionAnswer(q.getAnswer()); taskTest.setAnswer(q.getStuAnswer()); taskTest.setUserId(user.getId().toString()); taskTest.setUserName(user.getUsername()); String currentDateTime = DateUtil.getCurrentDateTime(); taskTest.setCreateTime(currentDateTime); taskTestList.add(taskTest); } taskTestService.saveBatch(taskTestList); return R.ok(); }} If you have any questions, please contact me at email or submit an issue for help.

title: Sequential List
content: Recap Linear list has two physical storage structure: Sequential and Linked. The former one uses continuous address to store elements one by one. 123456const int MaxSize = 1000;typedef int ElemType;typedef struct { ElemType *elem; int length;} SqList; How to think about GetElem(), this is equivalent to returning the value of the ith position element in the linear list L, just returning the value of index i-1 in the array. Human Thinking D1 D2 D3 … Di … Dn Technically 0 1 2 … i-1 … n-1 123456789101112#define OK 1;#define ERROR 0;typedef int Status; Status GetElem(SqList list,int i,ElemType *elem){ if(i<1||i>list.length) { return ERROR; } else { *elem=list.elem[i-1]; return OK; }} What about funtion ListInsert()? Insert new element e into ith position of list L. First we should think about if array defined capacity is not enough for the sequential list and if index i is not between range, so the volume of it should be expanded. Then starting from the last element, traverse to the ith position, turn them all one bit backward each. 12345678910111213Status ListInsert(SqList* list,int i,ElemType elem){ if(i<1||i>list->length+1) return ERROR; if(list->length==MaxSize) return OVERFLOW; int j; for(j=list->length-1;j>=i-1;j--){ list->elem[j+1]=list->elem[j]; } list->elem[i-1]=elem; list->length++; return OK;} Delete ith position element, store it with e, length of sqlist - 1. 1234567891011Status ListDelete(SqList* list,int i,ElemType* elem){ int k; if(list->length==0||i<0||i>list->length) return ERROR; *e=list->elem[i-1]; if(i<list->length) for(k=i;k<list->length;k++) list->elem[k-1]=list->elem[k]; list->length--; return OK;} Locate element by its value. 1234567int LocateElem(SqList list,ElemType elem){ int i; for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){ if(list.elem[i]==elem) return i+1; } return 0;} To sum up, from its struct and GetElem(), we can know that the sequential structure of a linear list allows for random access, as the elements are stored consecutively in memory. With the starting address and the size of the data elements, the ith element can be immediately located. This is the manifestation of the random access characteristic, and therefore, the time complexity of a sequential list is O(1). For value-based search, deletion, and insertion operations, the time complexity is O(1) in the best-case scenario and O(n) in the worst-case scenario. Therefore, the average-case time complexity is O(n). 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116#include <stdio.h>#include <stdlib.h>#define OK 1;#define ERROR 0;const int OVERFLOW = -2;const int MaxSize = 1000; typedef int Status;typedef int ElemType;typedef struct { ElemType* elem; int length;} SqList;Status InitList(SqList* list) { list->elem = (ElemType*)malloc(sizeof(ElemType) * MaxSize); if (!list->elem) { return OVERFLOW; }; list->length = 0; return OK;};Status ListTraverse(SqList list) { int j; for (j = 0; j < list.length; j++) { printf("%d ", list.elem[j]); } printf(" "); return OK;}Status CreateList(SqList* list, ElemType arrData[], int length) { int j; for (j = 0; j < length; j++) { list->elem[j] = arrData[j]; } list->length = length; return OK;}int GetLength(SqList list) { if (list.elem) { //线性表存在 return list.length; }; return ERROR;}Status GetElem(SqList list, int i, ElemType* elem) { if (i<1 || i>list.length) { return ERROR; } else { *elem = list.elem[i - 1]; return OK; }}int LocateElem(SqList list, ElemType elem) { int i; for (i = 0; i < list.length; i++) { if (list.elem[i] == elem) return i + 1; } return 0;}Status ListInsert(SqList* list, int i, ElemType elem) { if (i<1 || i>list->length + 1) return ERROR; if (list->length == MaxSize) return OVERFLOW; int j; for (j = list->length - 1; j >= i - 1; j--) { list->elem[j + 1] = list->elem[j]; } list->elem[i - 1] = elem; list->length++; return OK;}Status UnionList(SqList* listA, SqList listB) { int la_len = GetLength(*listA); int lb_len = GetLength(listB); int j; for (j = 1; j <= lb_len; j++) { ElemType e; GetElem(listB, j, &e); if (!LocateElem(*listA, e)) { la_len++; ListInsert(listA, la_len, e); } } return OK;}int main(void) { SqList list1, list2; InitList(&list1); InitList(&list2); ElemType waitInserted1[] = { 1,7,8, }; ElemType waitInserted2[] = { 2,4,6,8,10,11 }; int arrLength1 = sizeof(waitInserted1) / sizeof(waitInserted1[0]); int arrLength2 = sizeof(waitInserted2) / sizeof(waitInserted2[0]); CreateList(&list1, waitInserted1, arrLength1); CreateList(&list2, waitInserted2, arrLength2); ListTraverse(list1); ListTraverse(list2); UnionList(&list1, list2); ListTraverse(list1); return 0;} The sequential structure of a linear list is referred to as random access because it allows direct access to elements based on their physical storage location. In a linear list, the elements are sequentially stored in consecutive addresses in memory or storage media. Due to the contiguous storage property, the sequential structure enables fast access (or modification) to specific positions of elements using indices or offsets. For example, in an array that represents a linear list, if we want to access the element at the i-th position, we can easily calculate the address of that element and directly access it without having to traverse the entire structure. In contrast, other non-sequential structures (such as linked lists) do not possess the random access characteristic. In a linked list, elements are not necessarily stored in the order of their physical addresses. Each element only holds the address of the next element, requiring us to start from the head and traverse the linked list to find a specific position’s element.

title: Day 0
content: 在 Python 中，字符串（string）和数组（list）是两种常用的数据类型，它们的使用方式和一些常见操作有一些区别。 字符串 字符串是一系列有序的字符组成的序列。可以用单引号或双引号来表示一个字符串。例如： 12string1 = 'Hello'string2 = "World" 可以使用索引来访问字符串中的单个字符，索引从 0 开始。例如，string1[0] 将返回字符串 'H'。 1print(string1[0]) # 输出 'H' 也可以使用切片（slice）来获取子字符串。切片使用冒号 : 来指定起始位置和结束位置。例如，string1[1:4] 将返回字符串 'ell'。 1print(string1[1:4]) # 输出 'ell' 字符串是不可变的，意味着一旦创建就不能再修改。如果想修改字符串，只能通过创建一个新的字符串来实现。 数组 数组（list）是一系列有序的元素组成的序列。可以用方括号 [] 来创建一个数组，并且数组中的元素可以是不同的数据类型。例如： 1array = [1, 'Hello', 3.14, True] 可以使用索引来访问数组中的单个元素，索引同样从 0 开始。例如，array[0] 将返回整数 1。 1print(array[0]) # 输出 1 也可以使用切片来获取子数组。切片的用法与字符串类似。例如，array[1:3] 将返回一个新的数组 [Hello, 3.14]。 1print(array[1:3]) # 输出 [Hello, 3.14] 与字符串不同，数组是可变的，可以修改数组中的元素。例如，可以通过索引来修改数组的某个元素。 12array[0] = 100print(array) # 输出 [100, 'Hello', 3.14, True] 刷题 第0天的作业打卡 12345678910def looping(string): length = len(string) # 获取字符串的长度 i = 0 # 初始化循环变量 while i < length: print(f'comp {string[:length - i]} 9021') # 打印字符串的子串，使用f-string，将变量直接嵌入到字符串中，不需要使用额外的连接符或转换操作 i += 1 # 更新循环变量if __name__ == '__main__': string = "Programming" looping(string) Temperature conversions 12345678910111213141516# celsius_to_fahrenheit.pymin_temperature = 0max_temperature = 100stride = 10def celsius_to_fahrenheit(celsius): return (celsius * 9 / 5) + 32def celsius_to_fahrenheit_Table(): print("Celsius\tFahrenheit") for celsius in range(min_temperature, max_temperature, stride): fahrenheit = celsius_to_fahrenheit(celsius) print(f"{celsius:7d}\t\t{fahrenheit:6.0f}")if __name__ == '__main__': celsius_to_fahrenheit_Table() 12345678910111213141516# fahrenheit_to_celsius.pymin_temperature = 0max_temperature = 100stride = 10def fahrenheit_to_celsius(fahrenheit): return 5 * (fahrenheit - 32) / 9def fahrenheit_to_celsius_Table(): print("Fahrenheit\tCelsius") for fahrenheit in range(min_temperature, max_temperature, stride): celsius = fahrenheit_to_celsius(fahrenheit) print(f"{fahrenheit:10d}\t\t{celsius:3.0f}")if __name__ == '__main__': fahrenheit_to_celsius_Table() Max element and span in a list 使用管道，将字符串作为标准输入传递给脚本。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354# span.pyfrom random import seed, randintimport sysdef generate_number(seed_value,element_number): seed(seed_value) lst = [randint(0, 100) for _ in range(element_number)] return lstdef maximum_difference(generate_number_list): length=len(generate_number_list) for j in range(0,length): max_index = j for i in range(j+1,length): if generate_number_list[i]>generate_number_list[max_index]: max_index=i generate_number_list[j],generate_number_list[max_index]=generate_number_list[max_index],generate_number_list[j] return generate_number_list[0]-generate_number_list[length-1]def maximum_difference_with_builtin_operations(generate_number_list): if len(generate_number_list) < 2: return None min_num = max_num = generate_number_list[0] for num in generate_number_list: min_num = min(min_num, num) max_num = max(max_num, num) return max_num - min_num# [49, 97, 53, 5, 33, 65, 62, 51]# [17, 72, 97, 8, 32, 15, 63, 97, 57, 60, 83, 48]if __name__ == '__main__': # seed_value=int(input("Input a seed for the random number generator: ")) # element_number=int(input("How many elements do you want to generate? ")) try: seed_value = int(sys.stdin.readline().strip()) print("Input a seed for the random number generator: ",seed_value) except ValueError: print('Input is not an integer, giving up.') sys.exit() try: element_number = int(sys.stdin.readline().strip()) print("How many elements do you want to generate? ",element_number) except ValueError: print('Input is not an integer, giving up.') sys.exit() if element_number <= 0: print('Input should be strictly positive, giving up.') sys.exit() generate_number_list=generate_number(seed_value,element_number) print(f'The list is: {generate_number_list}') print(f'The maximum difference between largest and smallest values in this list is: {maximum_difference(generate_number_list)}') print(f'Confirming with builtin operations: {maximum_difference_with_builtin_operations(generate_number_list)}')

title: Day 1
content: 循环 enumerate 该函数用于在迭代过程中获取每个元素的索引和值，返回一个可迭代对象，该对象生成一个包含索引和值的元组。 1enumerate(iterable,start=0) 其中，iterable 是要遍历的可迭代对象，例如列表、元组、字符串等。而 start 是可选参数，用于指定开始的索引，默认值是 0。 12345678fruits = ['apple', 'banana', 'orange']for index, fruit in enumerate(fruits): print(f'Index: {index}, Fruit: {fruit}')# Index: 0, Fruit: apple# Index: 1, Fruit: banana# Index: 2, Fruit: orange 在这个例子中，enumerate(fruits) 返回了一个可迭代对象，其中每个元素都是一个包含索引和对应值的元组。通过使用 index 和 fruit 分别接收索引和值，可以在循环中打印每个水果的索引和值。 除了使用默认的开始索引 0，你还可以使用 start 参数来指定开始的索引值。下面的示例将开始索引设置为 1： 12345678fruits = ['apple', 'banana', 'orange']for index, fruit in enumerate(fruits, start=1): print(f'Index: {index}, Fruit: {fruit}')# Index: 1, Fruit: apple# Index: 2, Fruit: banana# Index: 3, Fruit: orange 例题：获取10-20之间的prime number，如果不是质数，指出他们的因子。 for-else 12345678for number in range(10, 20): for factor1 in range(2, number): if number % factor1 == 0: factor2 = number / factor1 print(f'{factor1}*{factor2:0.0f}={number}') break else: print(f'{number} is a prime number') for-if-else 123456789for number in range(10, 20): for factor1 in range(2, number): if number % factor1 != 0: print(f'{number} is a prime number') break else: factor2 = number / factor1 print(f'{factor1}*{factor2:0.0f}={number}') break while-else 123456789101112number = 10while number < 20: factor1=2 while factor1<20: if number%factor1==0: factor2=number/factor1 print(f'{factor1}*{factor2:0.0f}={number}') break factor1+=1 else: print(f'{number} is a prime number') number+=1 刷题 第1天的作业打卡 来自quiz_1-2.pdf 待读取的文件内容可以这样写： 123John Dick,MJane Smith,FMichael Johnson,M 注意 .strip()和.removesuffix()都是Python字符串操作，分别用于删除字符串两端的空白字符和指定的后缀，其中，.removesuffix() 是在Python 3.9中引入的。 .strip() 方法用于删除字符串开头和结尾的空白字符，包括空格、制表符、换行符等。 12text = " Hello, World! "print(text.strip()) # 输出: "Hello, World!" .removesuffix(' ') 方法用于删除字符串末尾的指定后缀。 12text = "Hello, World! "print(text.removesuffix(' ')) # 输出: "Hello, World!" 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657import sysfrom os.path import existsdef print_rhombus(space_number, symbol): print('Here is a rhombus:') print() # 方法一：枚举 # half_layers=2 # print(' ' * (space_number + 2) + '*') # print(' ' * (space_number + 1) + '*' + ' ' * 1 + '*') # print(' ' * (space_number + 0) + '*' + ' ' + symbol + ' ' + '*') # print(' ' * (space_number + 1) + '*' + ' ' * 1 + '*') # print(' ' * (space_number + 2) + '*') # 方法二：循环 half_layers=2 print(' ' * (space_number + half_layers) + '*') for i in range(half_layers-1,0,-1): print(' '*(space_number+i)+'*'+' '*(2*(half_layers-i)-1)+'*') # (2*half_layers-2)/2=half_layers-1 print(' ' * (space_number + i-1) + '*' + ' '*(half_layers-1) + symbol + ' '*(half_layers-1) + '*') for i in range(1,half_layers): print(' '*(space_number+i)+'*'+' '*(2*(half_layers-i)-1)+'*') print(' ' * (space_number + half_layers) + '*') print()def print_lines(file_name): print('Here are the people listed in the file:') with open(file_name) as file: for line in file: line = line.strip() # 判断不是空行并且包含逗号 if line and ',' in line: name, gender = line.split(',') last_name, first_name = name.split() gender = 'Mr.' if gender.strip() == 'M' else "Mrs" print(f"{gender} {first_name} {last_name}")if __name__ == '__main__': try: space_number = int(input("Enter a positive integer (possibly 0): ")) symbol = input("Input a symbol: ").removesuffix(" ") if space_number < 0 or symbol is None: raise ValueError except ValueError: print("Input is not an positive integer, giving up.") sys.exit() file_name = input('Input the name of a file in the working directory: ').removesuffix(' ') if not exists(file_name): print('Incorrect directory, giving up.') sys.exit() print_rhombus(space_number, symbol) print_lines(file_name) Classifying elements in a list 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031from random import randint, seedif __name__ == '__main__': seed_value = int(input("Input a seed for the random number generator: ")) element_number = int(input("How many elements do you want to generate? ")) res = [] seed(seed_value) lst = [randint(0, 20) for _ in range(0, element_number)] print(lst) first_interval, second_interval, third_interval, forth_interval = 0, 0, 0, 0 for item in lst: if item <= 4 and item >= 0: first_interval += 1 elif item <= 9 and item >= 5: second_interval += 1 elif item <= 14 and item >= 10: third_interval += 1 else: forth_interval += 1 print( f"There is {first_interval} element between 0 and 4." if first_interval > 0 else "There is no element between 0 and 4.") print( f"There is {second_interval} element between 5 and 9." if second_interval > 0 else "There is no element between 5 and 9.") print( f"There is {third_interval} element between 10 and 14." if third_interval > 0 else "There is no element between 10 and 14.") print( f"There is {forth_interval} element between 15 and 19." if forth_interval > 0 else "There is no element between 15 and 19.")

title: Day 2
content: 刷题 第2天的作业打卡 给定任意一个整数 输出该整数有多少个数字是大于0的 输出该整数中有多少个偶数数字，有多少个奇数数字 精简前 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829def postive_numbers(value): p_n = 0 res = [] for character in value: if int(character) > 0: p_n += 1 res.append(character) output = ', '.join(res) print(f'有{p_n}个数字大于0, 分别是{output}')def odd_or_not(value): o_n = 0 e_n = 0 res1, res2 = [], [] for character in value: if int(character) % 2 != 0: o_n += 1 res1.append(character) else: e_n += 1 res2.append(character) output1 = ', '.join(res1) output2 = ', '.join(res2) print(f'有{e_n}个偶数数字: 分别是{output2},有{o_n}个奇数数字: 分别是{output1}')if __name__ == '__main__': value=input("A integer please: ") postive_numbers(value) odd_or_not(value) 精简后 12345678910111213141516def postive_numbers(value): res = [character for character in value if int(character) > 0] output = ', '.join(res) print(f'有{len(res)}个数字大于0, 分别是{output}')def odd_or_not(value): res1 = [character for character in value if int(character) % 2 != 0] res2 = [character for character in value if int(character) % 2 == 0] output1 = ', '.join(res1) output2 = ', '.join(res2) print(f'有{len(res2)}个偶数数字: 分别是{output2}, 有{len(res1)}个奇数数字: 分别是{output1}')if __name__ == '__main__': value = input("A integer please: ") postive_numbers(value) odd_or_not(value)
